hero.h1: Every European market has a dominant SaaS.
hero.subtitle: DomRol builds operating systems for Europe's underserved industries — and custom digital products for yours.

products.label: Products
products.title: Building Europe's dominant SaaS
products.tableosDesc: The operating system for restaurants. Reservations, orders, kitchen display, and analytics — unified.
products.rentivoDesc: The rental management platform. Car rentals, yacht charters, villas — 24/7 automated booking.
products.rentalosDesc: White-label rental SaaS. Any vehicle, any country. Zero double bookings since launch.
products.driveDesc: Premium car rental in Marbella, Spain. The first live RentalOS operator on the platform.
products.nextDesc: The next European vertical is in the pipeline. We build one industry at a time.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we build for you
services.subtitle: We don't just build our own products — we build yours too.
services.websiteDesc: Premium websites that convert. Fast, modern, SEO-ready — built with the same stack as our own products.
services.saasDesc: Full-stack SaaS platforms. Booking systems, marketplaces, dashboards, operator backends — we've built them all.
services.aiDesc: Claude, GPT, and custom models embedded into your product. Chatbots, recommendations, automation — real AI, not gimmicks.
services.mobileDesc: React Native cross-platform apps. iOS and Android from a single codebase — the same tech behind Rentivo.
services.apiDesc: Supabase, Edge Functions, Stripe, webhooks — robust backends that scale. We handle the infrastructure.
services.designDesc: Brand identity, UI components, and design systems. Consistent, professional, and ready for any screen.
services.ctaNote: Every project is built with the same AI-accelerated speed we use for our own products.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Our work
portfolio.subtitle: Every project we take on gets the full DomRol treatment.
portfolio.dunaiDesc: Full-stack automotive dealership website. Dark theme with coral accent, AI car advisor chatbot, admin panel, fleet management, booking system, and Supabase backend.
portfolio.zoldfeszekDesc: Premium restaurant website with online reservation system, menu management, and TableOS integration. Built for Hungary's first TableOS customer.
portfolio.driveDesc: Premium car rental platform in Marbella, Spain. Powered by RentalOS — the first live operator on the platform.
portfolio.cta: Want to be next? Start a project →

whyUs.label: Why DomRol
whyUs.title: Why teams choose us
whyUs.provenDesc: 5 live products. Real customers. Real revenue. Not a pitch deck.
whyUs.speedDesc: We build 10× faster than traditional agencies using the same AI stack we ship with our own products.
whyUs.stackDesc: The same architecture powers every product. Lessons from one vertical immediately improve all others.
whyUs.euDesc: GDPR, data residency, EU VAT — built in from day one. No legal debt when you scale.
whyUs.ownershipDesc: Your brand, your domain, your data. Zero commission. Zero vendor lock-in. Yours forever.
whyUs.maintainDesc: Deploy, monitor, maintain, iterate. You focus on your business. We handle the infrastructure.

about.label: About
about.title: The people behind DomRol
about.rolandDesc: Builder. Every DomRol product is coded, designed, and shipped by me — with AI as the co-pilot.
about.dominikDesc: Operator. Sales, growth, and partnerships — turning what we build into real business.
about.footer: Built in Hungary 🇭🇺 — shipping across Europe.

waitlist.label: Early access
waitlist.title: Join the waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Be the first to know when we launch. Tell us what you're building.
waitlist.successDesc: We'll reach out as soon as we have a spot for you.
